allow: PowerShell($response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/portainer/portainer-mcp/releases/latest" -UseBasicParsing; $response.assets | Select-Object name, browser_download_url | Format-Table)
PowerShell(python -c "import mcp; print\(mcp.__version__\)" 2>&1; python -c "import httpx; print\('httpx ok'\)" 2>&1)
